implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Both task-work and direct paths use delta
First task reports full diff correctly
Logging shows baseline vs delta counts

completion_promises.criterion_text: Baseline captured before each task invocation (both task-work and direct paths)
completion_promises.evidence: Added _baseline_state field to AgentInvoker.__init__ and capture in invoke_player() before both task-work and direct paths. The baseline is captured via _snapshot_worktree_state() which calls _detect_git_changes() and returns sets of modified/created files.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Git-detected file counts reflect only per-task changes, not cumulative feature changes
completion_promises.evidence: Both _create_player_report_from_task_work and _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report now compute delta = current_git_changes - baseline_state. Files in the baseline are excluded from the report, ensuring only per-task changes are attributed.
Replaced union-based git enrichment (original_modified | git_modified) with delta computation (git_modified - baseline_modified). The delta is then merged with the task_work_result files via union.

completion_promises.criterion_text: _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report uses delta instead of raw git state
completion_promises.evidence: Replaced raw git state assignment with delta computation. files_modified and files_created now contain only delta values (git_changes - baseline_state).

completion_promises.criterion_text: First task in worktree still reports correct file counts
completion_promises.evidence: When baseline_state is empty (first task), delta = current - empty = current, so the full diff is reported. Verified by test_first_task_reports_full_diff.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests verify delta computation with mock git state
completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/unit/test_agent_invoker_git_delta.py with 10 tests covering: snapshot capture, delta exclusion of baseline files, delta inclusion of new files, first-task full diff, and integration tests for both report paths.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Logging shows baseline vs delta counts for observability
completion_promises.evidence: Added logger.info calls in both _create_player_report_from_task_work and _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report with format: 'Git detection for {task_id}: baseline={N}+{N}, delta={N}+{N}'
